title: stelis jorgei
intro: Stelis jorgei, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. It has been reported to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used in herbal preparations to support immune function and ease coughs. In herbal medicine, Stelis jorgei is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
